case_title: ALEXANDER, CAROLYN MRS. VS SPECK, EMMERY MR. C/O ARROW CAB CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER, CAROLYN MRS. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPECK, EMMERY MR. C/O ARROW CAB CO. $463.79 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $463.79, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPECK, EMMERY MR. C/O ARROW CAB CO.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $663.79 FILED BY ALEXANDER, CAROLYN MRS. AS TO DEFENDANT SPECK, EMMERY MR. C/O ARROW CAB CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2004 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-26-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-30-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR $410.00. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SPECK, EMMERY MR. C/O ARROW CAB CO.
